name: local-search-neo
description: 借助 Everything 来进行文件搜索

scripts.build:addon: npm run prepare:addon && npm --prefix addon run build-release && node scripts/copy-addon.cjs
scripts.build:addon:dev: npm run prepare:addon && npm --prefix addon run build && node scripts/copy-addon.cjs
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test
